pages.title: Read the Screen
pages.text: $(li)Insert two genetic seeds.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Generation$(): the higher parent generation plus one.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Mutation$(): chance for a special result.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Twin$(): total chance for two outputs.$(br)$(li)$(bold)S / Y / P$(): ordinary offspring ranges.$(br2)Previews describe probabilities and ranges; they do not guarantee the final seed.

pages.title: Twin Rules
pages.text: $(li)Ordinary twin chance starts at 10%.$(br)$(li)It gains 2% per generation and caps at 60%.$(br)$(li)A special mutation always creates two identical offspring.$(br)$(li)Both parent seeds are consumed.$(br)$(li)No splice creates more than two seeds.
